title: An Active Type IV Secretion System Encoded by the F Plasmid Sensitizes Escherichia coli to Bile Salts
summary: The paper discusses the sensitivity of Escherichia coli F+ strains to bile salts when infected with donor-specific bacteriophages M13 and M13K07. The sensitivity is linked to the expression of F genes required for conjugative pili formation and the secretion of phage particles through the cell envelope.

extra.sensitivity_to_bile_salts: linked to F pilus formation and phage particle secretion
linked to F pilus formation and phage particle secretion
